message:
fix(mvcc): use established snapshot for empty pages in deferred range scans

The read_page_range method captured txn.snapshot.high into fallback_version
before iterating, but for deferred transactions the snapshot isn't
established until the first actual read. Empty pages (where resolve
returns None) were using the pre-establish snapshot high, creating
inconsistent read tracking.

Fix: Use txn.snapshot.high directly at each empty-page recording point.
For deferred transactions, the first non-empty page establishes the
snapshot, and subsequent empty pages in the same range scan correctly
use the established snapshot high.

Added test: read_page_range_deferred_uses_established_snapshot_for_empty_pages
verifies that empty pages record the post-commit snapshot version, not
the stale BEGIN-time snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
